Who we are

Cum coin

CUM Coin The Ultimate Meme Currency Uniting North America

What is CUM

CUM Coin CUM is the most YUGE and tremendously patriotic meme coin on the market inspired by the boldest most tremendous geopolitical vision never realized merging Canada the USA and Mexico into one unstoppable superpower CUM Canada USA Mexico

This coin is not just a joke it is a movement A movement to unite all memers under one banner one currency and one absolutely absurd acronym Because lets be honest when you hear CUM you remember it

â€¢ Presidentially Inspired If a certain someone ever runs again we might just hear Make CUM Great Again

â€¢ Cross Border Appeal Whether you are in the US Canada or Mexico CUM belongs to everyone

â€¢ Liquidity You Will Not Forget CUM is designed to flow smoothly across markets providing maximum gains
